feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Flexible workflow Purchase Contract Email not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I have copied below predelivered templates from maintain email templates for purchase contract but still email not working.

MM_PUR_PC_DEFAULT_TEMPLATE
MMPUR_CTR_WFL_APPROVED_EMAIL
MMPUR_CTR_WFL_REJECTED_EMAIL

could any one advise on the issue. I am using s/4 hana 2022 private cloud

regards

md

entry.title: Fiori App ''My Inbox' Enhancement Requirement
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are looking to enhance the 'My Inbox' Fiori app for additional fields for PR and PO Approvals. We are looking for suggestions from SAP to approach this requirement.

 

Issue Details:

  1. New field will be made visible in 'My Inbox' App for PR and PO Approvals.
  2. Value for the new field will be based on data stored in SAP Tables.
  3. We need to understand the feasibility of the above requirement.
  4. If feasible what is the correct technical approach to this requirement?
  5. Are there any predefined hook up points or BADI available to make this enhancement?
  6. What are the supposed changes from ABAP and Fiori point of view?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP CO: Cost Centers CDS Extractors?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

we are currently looking for CO CDS extractors that replace the old SAPI extractors. Most extractors could have been replaced (especially master data extractors) but we can not find equivalents to the Cost Center extractors:

0CO_OM_CCA_1 ???

0CO_OM_CCA_9 ???

 

For Statistical Key Figure Items (0CO_OM_CCA_4) we have found C_StatisticalKeyFigureItem that looks quite the same as the old extractor. Statistical Key Figures - Actuals 

 

Background: Customer has SAP R/3 System, connected to BW and switches now to S/4HANA Cloud. BW should get the new data from S/4 with the same structure in order to have as minimal changes as possible in BW. Therefore we are looking for extractors with similar structure. 

 

Thanks in advance for you help!

entry.title: Change of item category from standard to different item category once PO is created
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Once a Purchase Order (PO) is created with the item category set as Standard, it is currently possible to update it to a different item category, provided there is no history.

 

We would like to know if it is possible to restrict changes to the item category in this scenario, or if a custom enhancement would be required.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Getting error in Eclipse ADT "Business Catalog is not supported in the selected project"
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on an SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming Model) application in Eclipse ADT. I need to schedule Background Job. While trying to create a Business Catalog using the context menu (New > Other Repository Object > Business Catalog), I get the following error:

"Business Catalog is not supported in the selected project"

I am not sure why this is happening, as I expected to add a catalog and create/assign Role to get Job template in Application Job screen. 

What I’ve Done:

  • Using Eclipse ADT (latest version) connected to an on-premise S/4HANA system.

  • I have created Application Job object and added sub object,  then created a class and created Application Job Catalog Entries and assigned class to it and then created Application Job Template (save and activated all).
  • I am unable to see custom template which I created in Application Job tile.
  • Upon further investigation, I got to know that we need to setup Authorizations for that I need to create Business catalog and Role for Authorization.
  • Right clicked on package and clicked on ABAP repository object but unable to find Business catalog. Then I selected my DEV system client from Eclipse, right clicked on it New ->other ->cloud Identity and access management ->Double clicked on Business Catalog, getting above error.

Question:

  • Why am I getting this error?

  • Is there a specific project type or system requirement for creating Business Catalogs in Eclipse ADT?

  • Do I need to configure something in the backend to enable this functionality?

Any help or guidance would be much appreciated!

Thanks,
Akbar Hussain

entry.title: Cloud Connector access to AL11 directory
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help to understand how to get the internal host of SFTP?

--Symptom--

  • We created few folders in AL11 directory, now we need to fetch the data from that folder to CPI via cloud connector to S4HANA Private Cloud. 
  • The blog is followed:
    https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/step-by-step-procedure-to-establish-cpi-to-sftp-server-connection/ba-p/13520842

 

For Cloud Integration to access file storage, you must expose the file storage using FTP or SFTP protocol, by setting up FTP or SFTP service (as Server).

But how to get the internal host of SFTP?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Best Practices activation for Kenya - SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We're going for an SAP S/4HANA greenfield implementation on RISE, and we'd like to activate Best Practices for Kenya only.

However, we couldn't find Kenya in the KBA 3393679, which left us with a doubt:

  • Is it possible to implement Best Practices for Kenya in the context provided above?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Implementation team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding SAP Licensing (RISE)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am currently working as a licensing team member and have some questions related to SAP Licensing (RISE). Recently, several systems from our SAP infrastructure transitioned to RISE, and we have the following queries regarding licensing:

  1. While conducting measurements using the USMM_OLD and SLAW transaction codes, we noticed that most of the systems that moved to RISE have different default price lists selected. Some are set to "SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition," while others are listed as "S/4HANA Cloud." We have transitioned to the "Private Cloud." How can we determine the correct price list , especially since the systems labelled as "S/4HANA Cloud" do not provide an option to select the other price list model, and vice versa?
  2. When attempting to run SLAW2 for these systems, we found that they are still reporting the old measurements. In the user selection, they are indicating license usage for "CB - SAP Application Professional" and "CC - SAP Application Limited Professional." However, the licenses in the SAP RISE Private Cloud should be categorized as either GA, GB, GC or IA, IB, IC.

    We would appreciate your assistance in resolving these issues.

    Thank you!

entry.title: Exchange Rate Integration with Bloomberg in SAP S4 HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Could you please suggest what is the best way to consume/Transfer the data from CPI to S4C system. The standard solution is SAP MRM. But this SAP MRM is the Paid version i mean its subscription based. As of now the client has to load the exchange rates for 4 currency pairs only. In On-Premises system we have the same set up to consume/Transfer the data to S4 HANA with IDoc (IDOC Message type: EXCHANGE_RATE). This IDoc message type is not supporting in the Private Cloud version. 

If anyone works on the same requirement in the Private Cloud, please suggest the solution for exchange rate automation with Bloomberg. Any standard API's is suitable for this requirement.

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Ganesh.

entry.title: Create Sales Order (Manage Sales Order V2) - Product Proposal not working
entry.content:
Dear guys,

we want to use the Manage Sales Order V2 in order to create new sales order using the product proposal feature.

Therefore we have configured the product proposal as described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/3f335e9dbdde405ba0e456031c4daa6a.html?locale=en-US

  • Maintain Algorithm Parameters for Intelligent Product Proposal

  • Maintain Backgr. Procedure Determination for Intelligent Product Proposal

  • Maintain Online Procedure Determination for Product Proposal

The mentioned API is also configured and works fine but it isn't triggered at all:
API_INTELLIGENTPRODUCTPROPOSAL_SRV

Additionally we created an entry in Fiori App "Manage Sales Item Proposal" and assigned it to the vendor number.

In VA01 everything works fine but in the Fiori app the products are not proposed - the button "Propose Items" is greyed out.

Br
SC

entry.title: Creation customer folder in usr/sap/SID/ is not possible with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Dear community member,

After conversion and migration from ECC on premise to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition with Rise envrionment , we remarks a folder is missing in /usr/sap/SID/. It is a customer folder created and we use it to store interface file from/to SAP Program and to store template file used by SAP Program.

We use FILE transaction for the logical file name/physical file name and we retrieve our logical file on /usr/sap/SID/xxx/yyy.

We try to create this one like /usr/sap/SID/userdata but it seems it is not possible.

How can we get this folder and its tree structure into the /usr/sap/SID/  folder?

Best regards,

Sarah

entry.title: copy co pa actual to plan version in sap s/4 hana private cloud
entry.content:
hi

I have a question about SAP CO PA(Costing based). I want to copy co pa actual to plan version. 

But I can not find T-code. Do I need to develop a CBO (Custom Business Object) program?

If not please let me know the standard T-code.

thanks Regards

entry.title: Delivery block is getting removed automatically when Down Payment request is cleared
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm Facing one issue with regards to Down Payment Processing through Milestone billing.

I have created one Sales Order with item category CBAO, entered Billing Plan date and value at Item level and save the order. Then I created a down Payment request through VF01 and then cleared it. But I can't find any Down Payment status either at header or at item level. And the Delivery block is still there, It's not getting removed automatically upon Down Payment clearance.

Could anyone please tell me what could be the possible reasons?

Regards,

Seemita.

entry.title: How to change the background user for SAP Cloud ALM jobs current scheduled?
entry.content:
Hello SAP support,

Is there any quick way to change an user for all the use-case jobs currently scheduled?
Or I have to do it manually for every released job via SM37?

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Adding an non leading ledger in Live CFIN System (SAP Private cloud) for US GAAP
entry.content:
We need help in understanding the following business use case:

Our client currently is on CFIN system and its live hosted on Private cloud (Rise with SAP), Currently has three ledgers Leading ledger for IFRS, Local GAAP & Tax Ledger.

For Consolidation requirement, they want to add an additional ledger in CFIN, can you tell us the procedure for the same, need to following things:

1) Process to achieve that

2) Impact on current system

3) Extension ledger vs Additional Ledger difference, comparison and what should be the ideal way to achieve this

4) Impact on other modules like FI-AA etc and process to overcome those issues

entry.title: S/4 HANA Private Cloud Extensibility - Manage Reservation Items
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am looking to extend the standard SAP FIORI App - Manage Reservation Items. Specifically, I would like to add a new filter based on the MARC table (Custom Z field) to filter items records  and a button for goods movement. I would greatly appreciate your suggestions on how to approach this while adhering to the clean core methodology.

Do I need to extend App using Custom Fields App or directly extending the underlying CDS View.

Thank you very much for your assistance.

Best regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: How do we check the message format that will be used by the EDI channel in S4 Output Management?
entry.content:
Hi,

How do we know which message formats will be used by the EDI channel in S4 Private Cloud? From the documentation, it says to check the documentation of the communication scenario. Where do we exactly check those?

While there is also an IDOC channel, it says that it is only restricted to intercompany billing.

entry.title: Missing tab in SOAMANAGER
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We're currently activating our Inbound for EDI, and while we run the SOAMANAGER, we didn't see the "Application and Scenario Communcation Tab". 

Is there any updates or changes for this tab name in SOAMANAGER? or is there a guide to add this tab via authorization in SU01 to be visible this in SOAMANAGER?

BTW, currently we're using S4 HANA Private Cloud Edition 2020.

Thank you in advance!
-Jaspher

entry.title: CDS view not visible Code List Based on CDS View
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created custom CDS View developed in ABAP ADT tool.  The view is not visible as Value Help View when I am trying to create in  custom fields and logic App (S4 HANA) . I have selected the type Code List Based on CDS View

Please advise what is missing

entry.title: Mass Maintenance Product: No process template for process goal
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Im facing this problem where I want to use the Mass maintenance for products (system private cloud). Customer has no MDG but as im aware of this Fiori app (MDC) is usable without MDG in scope. 

 

I did all configuration but can not find the process goal Basic Mass Update. I activated the predefined Process Template SAP_MM_MAS 

How can I solve this and make the app work? Anyone some tips? Thanks in advance!

 

KR Josef
